sglang.title: Add a watch dog thread
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add a watch dog thread. It will kill itself if any batch exceeds 10 mins.
Fix kill_parent_process and kill_child_process.

sglang.title: Fix Triton decode kernel & ut
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Set upper-bound limit for BLOCK_H in grouped decode Triton kernel to avoid OOM
Fix and add Triton attention kernel unit tests

sglang.title: support token ids in `engine.generate`
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

engine.generate does not support input ids now
Modifications


Support llm.generate(input_ids=token_ids_list, sampling_params=sampling_params)

Note: Users can already pass skip_tokenizer_init=True into sgl.Engine since it parses args as server args
Usage
import sglang as sgl
from sglang

vllm.title: [core] cudagraph output with tensor weak reference
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
to correctly use cudagraph, we have to:

capture the graph


prepare input buffer
run the graph (buffers created and destroyed inside cudagraph will be replayed later)
save the output buffer


replay the graph


copy data to input buffer
replay the graph
read data from the output buffer

say we have

vllm.title: Fix cache management in "Close inactive issues and PRs" actions workflow
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Error: Error delete _state: [403] Resource not accessible by integration
Consequence: Stale workflow cannot update its cache, so it always starts from the first cache
Solution: actions/stale#1133 (comment)

vllm.title: [torch.compile] support moe models
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
moe models will read config file to determine the triton config to run.
reading files during forward is a disaster for torch.compile .
this pr wraps the config reading part inside a custom op, so that it can pass torch.compile (although torch.compile will not be able to optimize it).

vllm.title: Fix beam search eos
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

beam_search via the api is including the eos token in the text
I do not think we can use tokenizer.decode(xxx, skip_special_tokens=True) because this strips out all the special tokens in chat templates
